headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles with a 17-1 victory, led by Willson Contreras' 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. The Seattle Mariners rallied to defeat the St. Louis Cardinals 11-9, with Nathan Church hitting a pair of home runs and driving in four runs. The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 win over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto contributing a 2-hit, 1-home run performance.

Several players have been sidelined due to injuries. Logan O'Hoppe, the Los Angeles Angels' catcher, has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left wrist fracture. Other players on the injured list include Riley Martin (Chicago Cubs, left elbow inflammation), Connor Seabold (Detroit Tigers, left ankle inflammation), Shawn Armstrong (Cleveland Guardians, right groin strain), Angel Chivilli (New York Yankees, right shoulder discomfort), Eugenio Suárez (Cincinnati Reds, mild left oblique strain), Nathan Lukes (Toronto Blue Jays, left hamstring strain), and Yimi García (Toronto Blue Jays, right elbow ulnar nerve and AC joint surgery).

The Toronto Blue Jays have made a trade, acquiring catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash, while the Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Come from Behind to Defeat Cardinals 11-9**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, overcoming a late deficit to secure the win. Nathan Church led the Mariners' offense with a pair of home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians in their latest matchup. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 2 runs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Marlins in 6-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 win over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Schmitt leading the offense. Schmitt hit 2 home runs, drove in 2 runs, and went 3 for 3 at the plate.

top_news.title: **Logan O'Hoppe Sidelined with Left Wrist Fracture**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels catcher Logan O'Hoppe has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Willie MacIver in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have acquired catcher Willie MacIver in a trade with the Texas Rangers, who received cash in return.
